events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario: heavy industrial, Lockout/Tagout, observed field condition: group lockbox misused. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Group lockbox misuse can lead to unexpected energization, serious injury/fatality. In LOTO, misuse of group lockbox is critical. But maybe high. Need decide. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: group lockbox misused; keys not properly secured? We don't have exact visible cues, but scenario says group lockbox misused. We can list likely defect cues: group lockbox used as personal lock storage, keys accessible to unauthorized persons, lockbox not under control of authorized employee, multiple keys released, tags not attached, box not secured at isolation point, missing group lockout procedure. Actions: stop work, retrain authorized employees, implement group lockout procedure per OSHA, ensure each authorized employee applies personal lock to group lockbox, keys remain in box until all personal locks removed, verify zero energy state, document and reinspect. References: OSHA 1910.147(c)(7)(i) group lockout, 1910.147(f)(3) group lockout or tagout, 1910.147(c)(1) energy control program. Need include percent_complete maybe 80? rough-complete. Value 0. Sound etc default. Confidence 0.95. Event_time 0. Order empty. Workable empty. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.

  "findings": [
    "Group lockbox is being misused, defeating the group lockout/tagout procedure",
    "Visible cues include personal locks stored in or on the group box rather than isolating energy sources, keys released or accessible before all personal locks are removed, lockbox not secured at the point of isolation, or tags missing/incomplete",
    "Authorized employees may not have individual control over their energy isolation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop affected work immediately and secure the area",
    "Remove all locks and re-establish proper group lockout under a written group lockout procedure",
    "Ensure each authorized employee places a personal lock on the group lockbox and retains control until their work is complete",
    "Verify zero energy state and that keys remain secured in the lockbox until all personal locks are removed",
    "Retrain personnel on group LOTO requirements and reinspect before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "A misused group lockbox bypasses the primary protection of group lockout/tagout by allowing unauthorized or uncontrolled removal of isolation, creating a risk of unexpected energization or startup. This is non-compliant with OSHA 1910.147 and warrants a fail decision.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) - Energy control program",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(7) - Group lockout or tagout",
    "OSHA 1910.147(f)(3) - Group lockout or tagout procedures"
  ]
}
